title: Static IP and MAC addresses are allowed in rootless CNI
body:
Loosen some restrictions within specgen around rootless
    containers - they can now set static IP and MAC addresses as long
    as they are in a CNI network.
    
    Fixes #7842
    
    Signed-off-by: Matthew Heon <matthew.heon@pm.me>

@zhangguanzhang Looks like the tests still fail?

The problem is that CNI is not actually setting the static IP and MAC. It
seems like the code we use to control both was never being called. Someone
will need to dig into the new rootless CNI code to figure out how to enable
this.
